title: Polarized Sprint Day
description: Polarized low-intensity base with neuromuscular bursts
purpose: Polarized low-intensity base with neuromuscular bursts

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 65 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Your aerobic system is thanking you.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 10:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 10 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 10 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 9:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 9:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 26% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% for 9:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/11. 0:08 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 200% FTP, Standing. 8s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 38% through. This is your workout. Own it. 200% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/11. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into session. 200%, 95-120 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 38% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 38% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 9:00 at 70%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 200% for 8s. Then 37min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:08 at 200%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 8s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5/11. 38 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 6 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 8s. Standing, 95-120 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 65-70% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/11. 47 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 62% complete. Rep 7/11. 200% at 95-120 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 7/11. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 4 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 4 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 7. 4 to go. 28 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 47 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 19 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 19 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 19 minutes to go. Easy does it. 70% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% done. 2 intervals left. 19 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 9. 46min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 56 minutes of work done. 19 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% done. 2 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 9/11. 200% FTP × 8s. Standing. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% complete. 10 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 74% complete. 70% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 56 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% done. 10 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 56 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 11/11. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 8s. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 8s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 8s. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 8s. Standing, 95-120 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 65 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 55min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
